reviews.review_description: I remember the og monkey mischeif. The music, the friends, the memories. I remember loading in with my friend that was probably my best friend on that game and we’d play the horror mode with the t posing monkey monster that was really fast, and we’d climb the trees while the music was playing in the background, I wish we could go back to it, it was more nostalgic than gorilla tag in my eyes. Can someone give me the song that og monkey mischief would play it was so amazing, I also remember being scared to go out of the computer area because the monster was out of sight. I really miss it all so much. It was probably my most favorite era of vr. I would get on it every day and it was just perfect. I wish I was 10 again.

reviews.review_title: I love this game even if im alone
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun even though I can’t play with anybody I love the movement in the game and I really like the music boxing and overall the map is just so cool and I like the bananas ￼￼

I remember my brother asking me to get this in 2022, codes were lanky but we did a bunch of stuff including the cave horror and floor is lava,  I remember jumping high off of a certain place into the water and I also remember a park our course, my brother doesnt even play anymore but atleast I got to play with him on the old version of this game
Please bring back old monkey mischief

This game was truly amazing back in 2022 I used to go around and tell everybody that this game was great and they play it with me but now it’s just empty. Nobody’s there to play with. Can’t find another person to even join up with. It’s so empty and lifeless now the effort was there to bring it back, but they gave up too soon this game could’ve had something great. It could’ve honestly become one of the greatest gorilla fan games of all time. but they fumbled please bring back the OG I watched this game every day, just in case it actually get an update. ￼￼

it's not the game we're just getting old so you see back then there are so many players and yes i admit 2022 and 2023 was at  Its peak  you see there's just other games that are taking over so that's probably why this game isn't popular anymore but yes rest in peace monkey mischief ❤️
Best game  of 2022

Please update the game to the og i probably had the most fun on this game during 2022-2023.
i played this recently and its nothing like the og, in my opinion the old version is way better
this game sucks now because there is a horrible horor maps and the og was way better horor and it was way funner and now the game sucks so bring back the og game
I don’t get why people want the og back, the og didn’t have anything fun or good.. but this. This one is very amazing! Keep it up!

reviews.review_title: Good game just got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: I was playing the game and having fun it’s a good game so I bought the mod menu the 5 doller one but for some reason it wouldn’t let me use it which kind of sucked but was alright because the games fun but suddenly it kicked me out of the game I went back in and I was banned for cheating and the time my ban was over it said never please help me I love this game I think it was just a glitch but please help.

Spent $5.33 on the mod menu thing, didn’t get it and I went to make a ticket. They said that they granted me the item, but they never actually did. Not only is this game a scamming cash grab, it it really buggy and the horror game mode doesn’t work.

developer_response.body: Please join the discord and create a ticket about this issue and ask for “ge0rgeperrin” to assist you with this issue. I’m sorry that you’ve had this experience and I hope to restore your purchase imminently.

reviews.review_description: Really cool game ￼

reviews.review_title: Bring back the old monkey mischief
reviews.review_description: I loved the horror and physics

The new revamp is kinda mid, but the most thing I wanted back was the OG version. It looked so fun back then, but once I got my first oculus the game just wasn’t the same. I also would like to see more horror add-ons in the game, since the cave wasn’t enough.

The game is good but when I was in horror people kept grabbing on me and the person that grabbed on to me said the N word hard r and people kept saying I was following them even though I was going to the slides

developer_response.body: Please if you see behaviour like this use our in game reporting system to help tackle this behaviour from persisting. You can follow up further with reporting these users with video footage in our discord by creating a ticket.

reviews.review_description: I loved the art style of this game, and the gamemodes were fun. The horror monsters make it impossible to actually go through the horror. The gamemodes don't make up for the lack of things to do on the map itself.

reviews.review_title: I love it almost better then big scary
reviews.review_description: So I just got the game I changed my color to blue then went to the shop I was sad that I couldn’t buy anything. But then I found a slide and I went in it was fun. Then I found some monkeys their nice they said do you what to play the horror I said yeah then they said ok we went down it was scary at first but then I got used to it but still very fun. I made some friends along the way:).ps I just started the game today.

reviews.review_title: Bring back the oldest version please
reviews.review_description: This was the greatest game ever until the revamp came and the horror mode was not the same. I liked it better with the old map and the lava game mode, to prove I’m am a og, I remember there was a place that you would get stuck in and it said there was candy there.
I bought it on day one got the cosmetic and I was sad wen it got shutdown 😭😭😭 but now I love it and made a bunch of memories 🙂🙂🙂🙂
